name: Group Kayaking
venue: Rowing Dock at Lady Bird Lake
reason: Iconic Austin experience where tandem kayaks naturally pair people up for conversation.

name: Escape Room Challenge
reason: Collaborative puzzle-solving that reveals team dynamics and communication styles in a fun setting.

name: Graffiti & Street Art Tour
venue: HOPE Outdoor Gallery / East Austin Murals
reason: Walking tour through Austin's vibrant street art scene that sparks creative thinking and discussion.

name: Stand-Up Paddleboarding
reason: Low-barrier water activity on Lady Bird Lake with plenty of time for casual conversations.

name: Cooking Class: Texas BBQ
reason: Hands-on BBQ class where teams learn rubs, smoking, and plating together before sharing a meal.

name: Bat Bridge Sunset Walk
venue: Ann W. Richards Congress Avenue Bridge
reason: Uniquely Austin experience watching 1.5 million bats emerge at sunset, a guaranteed conversation starter.

name: Guided Barton Springs Swim
reason: Natural spring-fed pool at a refreshing 68 degrees, perfect for unwinding after focused work sessions.

name: Live Music Crawl
reason: Guided tour of Austin's legendary live music scene, visiting three curated venues in one evening.

name: Team Trivia Night
reason: Pub trivia format that mixes teams across departments, rewarding diverse knowledge over seniority.

name: Morning Yoga in the Park
reason: Gentle yoga session outdoors that helps teams start the day grounded and connected.
